reviews.review_description: Along with my the other games that have actually reviewed recently, I have noticed that a lot of these games are dead, but they were actually really popular back in the day. In fact, this game even was with the VR Masters leak, one of the highly competitive leagues for VR games, but I wish this game had more people playing it. I would love to see more people joining it and just seeing how good it is. I just read this a two-star because there isn't anybody playing but I would love to see improvements
Fire
😍😍😍😍🥰🥰😘😘🥰😍🥰 best game I’ve ever played
Way better than paintball play ground because in piano all play ground kids just run down the field
W

reviews.review_title: I would give it 5 star with 2 chages
reviews.review_description: If this allowed for slightly different game customization so u could set ammo limit such as reload every 25 rounds rather then 200 I think this would add a cool magfed option . Also some sort of ranked lobby would be cool but I know that can be verry difficult.  More control of gu. Settings mixed with map builders, and I think it's a slam dunk without ranked
The game is very fun and easy to learn but one thing I wish they had was leg tracking because I often get shot in the leg because in the game my legs will go prone. But overall great game
Got bored after 45 min hardly any lobbies with people and the gun mechanics…….ooof with all there settings couldn’t they make it so you can switch dominant hand etc……
Game is fire

It’s a good game but the community isn’t very welcoming. No to mention when your the owner of a server and like bro I gust got the game idk what maps are “good”. Anyways you try to pick a new map and you can’t hear if they like the map or not over the 36 people yelling to start the game. Not to mention there’s 47296 maps so there just 14 people yelling at you for a new map giving you no directions on what map to pick. My first 10 minutes of playing the game I was cured out by a pro irl player who upon dying screamed that his whole team was trash. So 3/4 of them time someone’s screaming for some reason. When I’m not getting yelled at the game is good right up until someone shoots the air and I’m dead. This game would be a 3 but the community isn’t really fault of the devs.
It's just full of people that don't play any other games. I just got it and couldn't compete. Didn't meet a single nice person

reviews.review_title: Bought the game still have not received
reviews.review_description: Wouldn't know I bought the game and they wouldn't give me the email confirmation

developer_response.body:
You bought the game from App Lab, but were not able to install the game?  If that's the case, please contact Oculus/Meta support.

If there's something we can help with in terms of playing the game or creating a Snapshot account, reach out to us on Discord.

reviews.review_description: After 400 hours, I’d say so. It’s a new take on FPS, it’s paintball / speedball and the game does it great. If you want a refreshing, tactical and strategy based shooter then there isn’t really anything better. One shot one kill.
Yes

This game is very fun and good for practice irl but it’s very un polished and needs updating like, 12 players aloud in a lobby, auto reload with lvl 10 marker. Can shoot and get shoot through some bunkers.
Love the game but I would love to be able to tuck my knees or feet in closer to me when I’m next to a bunker
The bots are a little bit over powered but other than that it’s a great game
Best game for practicing I like this but the guns should have accuracy’s

This game is the reason I bought a Quest. As a paintball player, this is the closest you can come to playing speedball without leaving the house. Community on Discord is great, players in lobbies are always friendly yet very competitive, and there’s a league in VRML. 

Real paintball tournament field layouts and regular updates. 

For anyone who hasn’t played paintball, this is still a fun, fast paced PVP shooter that is worth your time to play!
Amazing game play! Just wish I could move my player in gameplay!
